issues.title: Key Insights are static text, not interactive
issues.description: The 'Key Insights' section shows hardcoded text that references overview data. A data analyst expects these to be dynamic and clickable.
issues.expected: Insights are dynamically generated and clickable to drill down
issues.actual: Static text with interpolated values; no interactivity

issues.title: Analysis page duplicates Dashboard without additional depth
issues.description: Analysis page shows the same TimeseriesChart and ArrestRateChart as Dashboard. A data analyst expects deeper analysis (correlations, distributions, comparisons).
issues.expected: Additional analytical views (distribution plots, correlation matrix, comparison tables)
issues.actual: Same charts as Dashboard with stat cards on top

summary: Analysis page is a thin wrapper around Dashboard charts without deeper analytical capability.
